3299450.name: Calame
3299450.description:
In a wartorn world of wrath and riches, the tyrannical King of Light manipulated the Calame – a transcendent magic that transforms written words into truth – and made himself a god. After years of violence and oppression, his power is all but absolute.

It is up to you to harness the forbidden power of the Calame to rebel against the King of Light and weave the threads of destiny. Rewrite history to twist the elements of the battlefield to your advantage. Fight alongside a diverse roster of 15 heroes, each unique personalities, and alter their stories and abilities. Author your own legend with a narrative campaign filled with epic combat encounters and rich storylines.

Will you rise as the people's champion or use the Calame to enforce your will? You decide how the story ends.

  • The official adaptation of the award-winning novel, Calame.

  • A classical tactical RPG with reality-bending twists.

  • Story-driven decisions that impact your journey, character development, and combat possibilities.

The King of Light is a powerful and unyielding . He is supposed to embody order, but his authority is seen as tyrannical by those who yearn for freedom. Without remorse, he does not hesitate to sacrifice individuals and entire nations in the name of what he considers the greater good. The region of Kenmare perfectly illustrates this oppression: women are enslaved and exploited by the King's forces.

Faced with this situation, Darran is driven by a visceral desire to overthrow the regime. His fight to liberate the women of Kenmare reveals his compassion to a just cause. However, his brutal methods and refusal of any compromise make him as dangerous as he is fascinating.

In the great conflict of Calame, Darran simultaneously represents the hope of liberation and the threat of a new tyranny—a paradox that makes him a central and captivating character.

Between the King of Light and Darran emerges Vera, bearer of a third path. Her desire to become queen does not stem from a simple quest for power, but from an aspiration to create a better world. Her alliance with the Panthers, a mysterious and powerful faction, embodies her attachment to nature, freedom, and rebellion.


Participate into intense battles, where planning will be as important as your fire power. Get the ideal position, outsmart your adversary, create devastating synergies between your companions - buffs, debuffs, attacks, spells, overdrives… get access to a lethal arsenal in the vein of the references of the genre. But there’s more…

Thanks to the Calame, modify the events taking place during combat, in order to tell the story you want to tell. Use the power of the Calame to make YOUR description of the battle come true, and thus modify your environment or affect certain units.

Make a bridge collapse to prevent an army reinforcement, let a pillar fall off the head of your ennemis, let a bone fire explode to create devestating AOE damage… You can also use the power of the Calame to rewrite the story, and come back to a certain moment of the battle to fix your strategy if you realize you made the wrong choices.

But be careful, the power of the Calame can give you the upper hand during battles, but always comes with counterparts. So use this power wisely!

The use of the Calame are like two different faces of a coin. Use it wisely, perform actions to rebuild, or protect, and dive into the GOTTARAN side. Use it without any limitation, making building collapse and focusing on offensive spells, and you will follow the DEIMONARAN path.

Each side of the Calame will let you unlock specific and affiliated skills. All your actions, the skills you used, the side objectives you complete during battles, etc. all of this has an impact on your alignment and will have direct consequences on your character build and story endings.

Lead the rebellion at the head of 15 adventurers with unique abilities and personalities (Warrior, Bard, Thief, Mage...), and immerse yourself in battles as epic as they are tactical. Between battles, recount your exploits and transform reality to develop your powers, rewrite history and forge YOUR legend.

During your journey, engaging (and replaying) battles will grant you with experience points, items and ressources for crafting. As your character progresses, gain new levels, boost your stats, unlock new skills and evolve into new character archetypes. The way you will let your character evolve will have a direct impact on your playstyle and can create devastating synergies with the rest of your companions.

Between missions, take time to rest at the Camp, craft/upgrade up to 60 weapons and 45 armors (all unique in design and stats) and never hesitate to talk to your favourite item and magic merchants. By discussion to your fellow companions, learn about their stories, tie bonds with them and discover their secrets.
3299450.supported_languages:
英语, 法语*, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
*具有完全音频支持的语言
